What We Do

Services

From framing to fixtures — general contracting and plumbing under one roof.

Home Remodeling

Kitchens, bathrooms, basements, and full interior renovations, planned and built around how you actually live.

Plumbing Repair

Leaks, clogs, fixture installs, and pipe replacement — handled by a crew that won't leave you with a bigger mess.

Structural & Framing

Load-bearing repairs, additions, and framing work done to code, with the paperwork and permits handled.

Additions & Build-Outs

Room additions, finished attics, and converted spaces that add real square footage and real value.

Drywall & Repairs

Water damage, holes, cracked walls, and ceiling repairs patched and finished so you can't tell where the damage was.

Emergency Calls

Burst pipe? Collapsed ceiling? We take emergency calls and prioritize getting someone to your door fast.

412-491-5259
Why 3JA

A crew that shows up, and stands behind the work

3JA Contracting LLC is a Pittsburgh-based general contracting and plumbing company built on doing the job right the first time — no shortcuts, no disappearing after the invoice.

Licensed & Insured

Every job is covered, every crew member accountable. You're protected from the first walkthrough to the final inspection.

Real Response Times

We pick up the phone and we show up when we say we will. Most quote requests get a callback within one business day.

General Contracting + Plumbing

Most jobs touch both trades. We handle them together, so you're not coordinating between two separate companies.
